objective: Perform the final #298 e2e closeout gate after active org repository intake and registry-surface reconciliation.
scope_boundary: Run live org inventory drift detection.
Run graphify target reconciliation and registry-surface validation.
Run subsystem selection checks for sweep, metrics, compendium, raw-feed, memory, Codex ingestion, and code governance.
Run compendium generation/check, memory integrity, metrics smoke, branch/ruleset evidence, Stage 6 closeout hook, and final local/CI validation.
Update #298/#314 progress and backlog mirrors only after final e2e evidence exists.
out_of_scope: Closing downstream blockers seek-and-ponder#23 or EmailAssistant#1.
Enabling EmailAssistant subsystems before repo-local bootstrap completes.
research_summary: #309 added live inventory drift detection, #310 added classification schema, #311 intook seek-and-ponder, #312 classified EmailAssistant as adoption_blocked with downstream blocker EmailAssistant#1, and #313 reconciled registry-dependent workflow/document/helper surfaces. #314 is the final evidence and closeout slice for #298.

sprints.name: Final Evidence Matrix
sprints.goal: Prove active org repo coverage and registry-dependent governance paths pass.
tasks: Run live inventory, registry, graphify, registry-surface, compendium, memory, metrics, branch/ruleset, and selection checks.
acceptance_criteria: Final AC: live GitHub org inventory and registry agree on active repo coverage.
Final AC: registry schema/classification validation passes.
Final AC: graphify/sweep/metrics/compendium/raw-feed/memory/Codex selection paths pass or have accepted linked deferrals.
Final AC: seek-and-ponder and EmailAssistant have explicit registry classifications.

sprints.name: Stage 6 Closeout
sprints.goal: Write closeout evidence and update governance status mirrors.
tasks: Move #298 and #314 to Done mirrors after final e2e proof.
acceptance_criteria: Final AC: Stage 6 closeout exists and cites exact command output.
Final AC: #298 is not marked done until final e2e gate passes.
Final AC: Local CI Gate and GitHub PR checks pass before merge.

specialist_reviews.summary: Final gate evidence recorded in raw/validation and Stage 6 closeout.

alternate_model_review.reviewer: Codex local validation and prior subagent reviews
alternate_model_review.summary: Prior #311-#313 read-only reviews and final local e2e matrix support closeout.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #314 may add final evidence, closeout, regenerated compendium, and status mirrors. It may not edit downstream repos.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run closeout hook, final validation, PR, and merge.

material_deviation_rules: If live org inventory drifts, stop and create issue-backed classification work.
If compendium or graph artifacts are stale, regenerate them in this closeout slice.
If downstream repo changes are needed, stop and create downstream issue-backed work.
approved_by: operator instruction: follow repo rules, no HITL, e2e testing as final AC
